name: ERPSMART Builder Publish Execution Record API Map

endpoints.purpose: List control-plane publish execution preparation records for a Builder definition.
Create a control-plane publish execution preparation record, acquire lock, run preflight, and write storage-only staging/rollback draft artifacts.
endpoints.notes: This is not publish and must not be treated as publish.

endpoints.purpose: Validate storage-only staged and rollback artifacts for a publish execution record.
endpoints.notes: Staged validation only. Writes validation report under storage/app/builder-publish-staged-validations and does not publish.

endpoints.purpose: Create a storage-only runtime write plan artifact from a staged-validated execution record.
endpoints.notes: Plan only. Writes runtime-write-plan.json under storage/app/builder-runtime-write-plans and does not copy files to runtime.
